app.name: Chitchatter
app.tagline: A peer-to-peer chat app that is serverless, decentralized, and ephemeral

home.title: Chitchatter
home.description: This is a free communication tool that is designed for simplicity, privacy, and security. All interaction between you and your online peers is encrypted. There is no record of your conversation once you all leave.

roomControls.turnOnMic: Turn on microphone and speak to room (hold ctrl + ` to speak)

peerList.unverifiedWarning: This person could not be verified with public-key cryptography. They may be misrepresenting themself. Be careful with what you share with them.
peerList.verified: This person has been verified with public-key cryptography
peerList.relayConnection: You are connected to {{name}} via a relay server. Your connection is still private and encrypted, but performance may be degraded.

connection.fullConnectionTip: Connections can be established with all peers that also have a full network connection.
connection.partialConnectionTip: Relay server is unavailable. Connections can only be established when a relay server is not needed for either peer.
connection.noConnectionTip: Pairing server is unavailable. Peer connections cannot be established.

serverFailureDialog.title: Server connection failed
serverFailureDialog.message: A pairing server could not be found. Make sure you are connected to the internet. If you still can't connect, try:

passwordPrompt.title: Room Password
passwordPrompt.description: You will only be able to connect to room peers that enter the same password.
passwordPrompt.mismatchWarning: If there is a mismatch, you will be in the room but be unable to connect to others. An error will not be shown.
passwordPrompt.label: Password

roomShareDialog.title: Copy URL with password
roomShareDialog.description: Copy URL to this private room containing an indecipherable hash of the password.
roomShareDialog.securityWarning: Be careful where and how this URL is shared. Anybody who obtains it can enter the room.
roomShareDialog.browserOnly: By design, the password hash does not leave the web browser.
roomShareDialog.copyWithPasswordTip: Copy room URL with password. No password entry required to access room.
roomShareDialog.copyUrlTip: Copy room URL. Password required to access room.
roomShareDialog.copiedWithPassword: Private room URL with password copied to clipboard
roomShareDialog.copiedWithoutPassword: Private room URL without password copied to clipboard
roomShareDialog.wrongPassword: Incorrect password entered. Please wait 2s to retry.

upgradeDialog.title: Update needed
upgradeDialog.message: In order to function properly, Chitchatter needs to be updated. The update has already been installed in the background. All you need to do is reload the page or click "Refresh" below.

environmentUnsupported.title: Environment unsupported
environmentUnsupported.message: Chitchatter is unable to start up. The following issues were detected:
environmentUnsupported.insecureContext: The app is not being served from a secure context
environmentUnsupported.noWebRTC: Your browser does not support WebRTC. Consider using a browser that does

userInfo.privateKeyNote: Your private key, which was also generated locally, is hidden and only exists on your device.

settings.title: Settings
settings.backgroundMessage: When a message is received in the background:
settings.selectSound: Select a sound that plays when you receive a message:
settings.hideTypingNote: Disabling this will also hide your active typing status from others.
settings.enhancedConnectivityNote: Use external TURN servers to improve connection reliability. Disable this if you prefer not to connect to third-party servers.
settings.exportProfileDesc: Export your Chitchatter profile data so that it can be moved to another browser or device. Be careful not to share the exported data with anyone. It contains your unique verification keys.
settings.importProfileDesc: Import your Chitchatter profile that was previously exported from another browser or device.
settings.deleteProfileDesc: Be careful with this. This will cause your user name to change from {{userId}} to a new, randomly-assigned name.
settings.storageNote: Chitchatter only stores user preferences and never message content of any kind. This preference data is only stored locally on your device and not a server.

about.title: About
about.content:
## User Guide

### Chat Rooms

Use the "Join public room" and "Join private room" buttons on the home page to create chat rooms. Public rooms are open to anyone who knows the URL. Private rooms require a password to join.

You can share the room URL with people you want to join. When everyone leaves, the room and its conversation history disappear automatically.

### Peer Verification

To ensure you are talking to the right person, Chitchatter uses public-key cryptography to verify peer identities. Each user has a unique pair of encryption keys for identity verification.

### Conversation Backfilling

When a new user joins a public room, existing message history is automatically synced to the new member. Private rooms do not support this for enhanced security.

### Message Authoring

Messages support Markdown formatting and code syntax highlighting. You can send text, share files, make video/audio calls, and share your screen.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content:
## Interpretation and Definitions

### Interpretation

The words of which the initial letter is capitalized have meanings defined under the following conditions. The following definitions shall have the same meaning regardless of whether they appear in singular or in plural.

### Definitions

For the purposes of this Disclaimer:

- **Application** refers to the software program Chitchatter
- **You** means the individual using the Application
- **Operator** refers to the operator of this Application

## Disclaimer

The information provided by the Application is for general informational purposes only.

The Operator assumes no responsibility for errors or omissions in the contents of the Application.

In no event shall the Operator be liable for any special, direct, indirect, consequential, or incidental damages.

The Application may contain links to external websites that are not provided or maintained by the Operator.

embedDialog.iframeDesc: Copy and paste this iframe HTML snippet into your project:
embedDialog.sdkDesc: As an alternative to using an iframe, you can use the Chitchatter SDK to embed a chat room as a Web Component with additional configuration options:

communityRooms.title: Community rooms
communityRooms.description: You can also chat in a public community room. You'll be anonymous, but be careful what information you choose to share.

fileShare.encryptingFiles: Encrypting a copy of the files...
fileShare.encryptingFile: Encrypting a copy of the file...
